author: y4rr
content: Done. Added jit-script + tokenize to default features; mps, xpu, llama, ml as opt-in; llama-cuda super-feature pulls in gpu+cudarc. Added ferrotorch-jit-script and ferrotorch-mps to workspace.dependencies (had been workspace members but not declared deps). New tests/public_surface.rs pins every README-documented module path so future drift fails at compile time. Gates: fmt clean, clippy --all-targets --features mps,xpu,ml,llama -- -D warnings clean, public_surface 13/13 pass, default + no-default-features both check.
